title: Start with what you need to do

steps.title: Create and edit
steps.description: Build Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF, Visio, Markdown, CSV, and other document formats from typed .NET APIs.

steps.title: Convert and render
steps.description: Move content between Office, PDF, HTML, Markdown, OpenDocument, RTF, and Google Workspace with focused converter packages.

steps.title: Read and extract
steps.description: Normalize text, tables, metadata, images, and chunks for search, review, ingestion, and AI-assisted workflows.

steps.title: Automate with PowerShell
steps.description: Use PSWriteOffice for scheduled reports, administration scripts, build pipelines, and repeatable document jobs.
